data.title: OSCAR-NOMINATED VIVA VERDI! LAUNCHES IMPACT CAMPAIGN WITH SPECIAL SCREENINGS AT MOUNT SINAI AND NYU, BRIDGING ART, AGING, AND COMMUNITY
data.description: On March 24, 2026, in New York, the highly-regarded Oscar-nominated documentary VIVA VERDI! began its Impact Campaign in response to increasing recognition and national fascination. The campaign features special screenings and discussions in collaboration with Mount Sinai Health System and New York.

data.title: Founder of Pastors For Trump & Tulsa Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer Announces Run for Congress at GOP Headquarters, Launches Campaign with Same-Day Kickoff Event
data.description: Today in Tulsa, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer, the founder of Pastors For Trump and lead pastor of Sheridan Church, declared his bid for Congress. He emphasized his focus on stability, security, and upholding Oklahoma values. The announcement was made on March 24, 2026, marking an important step in Lahmeyer's political journey. His entrance into the race signifies a shift towards a new direction in the political landscape, drawing attention from various quarters. This move could potentially impact the upcoming elections significantly.

data.title: Colangelo & Partners Named Agency of Record for Avignonesi Winery
data.description: The collaboration seeks to establish Avignonesi as a prominent authority in Tuscany, showcasing the potential for significant influence within the industry through responsible management and open communication. This initiative aims to elevate Vino Nobile di Montepulciano's standing in the United States. The announcement was made on March 24, 2026, in MONTEPULCIANO, Tuscany.

data.title: Marc-Michaels Interior Design, Inc. Receives Interior Design Magazine's 2026 "Top 100 Giants" Award; 1st in Residential
data.description: In Winter Park, Florida, on March 24, 2026, Marc-Michaels Interior Design, Inc. was recognized in Interior Design Magazine's 2026 "Top 100 Giants," marking their 27th consecutive year on the list. The company holds the 43rd position as one of the largest interior design firms, showcasing their consistent excellence in the industry.

data.title: IIT2026 GLOBAL CONFERENCE ANNOUNCES SADHGURU AS KEYNOTE SPEAKER
data.description: Long Beach, California, will host the IIT2026 Global Conference from April 22-25, 2026. The event will bring together top minds, innovators, and industry leaders from the United States and India at the Long Beach Convention Center. This conference aims to foster dialogue and collaboration among participants.

data.title: Woman-Owned Minnesota Cremation Services™ Offers Compassionate and Affordable Care
data.description: A recently launched small business is addressing the increasing demand for services in the Twin Cities and central Minnesota regions. Minnesota Cremation Services, operated by a female entrepreneur and her family, has recently opened its doors as of March 24, 2026. The company aims to cater to families in the Twin Cities and surrounding areas, providing cremation services.

data.title: Kawneer Celebrates 120-Year Anniversary
data.description: Kawneer, a prominent manufacturer of architectural aluminum systems, based in Norcross, Ga., marks its 120th anniversary with a focus on creating cutting-edge products that transform architectural concepts into concrete structures. Since its inception in 1906, Kawneer has been at the forefront of pioneering aluminum facades, maintaining their status as industry leaders. Through innovative offerings, they continue to elevate architectural designs, turning visionary ideas into tangible realities.

data.title: The Legendary Greezy Wheels Signs With Armadillo Records
data.description: Austin, TX - March 24, 2026 - Greezy Wheels, a band with a long history, has recently inked a deal with Armadillo Records to launch their last album, 'We Come We Go,' in the coming spring. Armadillo Records, established in 1969 in Austin, Texas, is excited to bring the new music to fans.

data.title: Element Science Named to Fast Company’s Annual List of the World’s Most Innovative Companies of 2026
data.description: A company based in San Francisco, Element Science, has been recognized as one of the most innovative companies globally by Fast Company magazine. This acknowledgment highlights Element Science's pioneering work in their field, showcasing their commitment to innovation and forward-thinking practices. The inclusion in this prestigious list underscores the company's significant impact and influence, solidifying its position as a leader in the industry. This achievement reflects Element Science's dedication to pushing boundaries and driving change.

data.title: Resolutions by Stora Enso Oyj's Annual General Meeting and the organising meeting of the Board of Directors
data.description: Stora Enso Oyj's Annual General Meeting took place on March 24, 2026 in Helsinki, Finland. The meeting finalized the accounts and Remuneration Report for 2025. Key decisions were made during the AGM, where important procedures were adopted, including the approval of financial statements and reports from the previous year. This event marks a significant moment for the company, showcasing its commitment to transparency and accountability.
